text:
As the world awaits the Olympics in Paris, Krispy Kreme is offering a new collection inspired by iconic Parisian desserts-- the Krispy Kreme Passport to Paris Collection.

“Most people can’t be in Paris to cheer on their country’s team. So, we’re giving you a ‘Passport to Paris’ in the form of delicious doughnuts with Parisian dessert flavors,” said Dave Skena, the Global Chief Brand Officer for Krispy Kreme, in a press release.

Here’s a look at the collection:

Krispy Kreme’s Passport to Paris Collection is available in-shop and for pickup or delivery via Krispy Kreme’s app and website. Select retailers are also carrying six packs of the treats.

Shauna Stuart is a features and news reporter on the Life & Culture team at AL.com. She's a resident busybody and over enthusiast who covers news, culture, history, the arts, and business. I am not a critic. ...more
